objective: Adversarial review of the GROVE-S02-T01 plan for the ExploreConfig model persisted to .grove/explore.json.
key_changes: Plan approved — maps 1:1 onto all seven task acceptance criteria (types, load/save/validate, defaults, tests, gates)

Atomic temp+rename save confirmed as genuine hardening — registry writes today use plain fs::write
Scope discipline good: steering content correctly deferred to T03; purely additive, only lib.rs edited
